title: IMPALA Training Dashboard
description: Complete monitoring dashboard for IMPALA Reinforcement Learning training

panels.title: 🎯 Training Loss (Lower is Better)
panels.description: Main training loss - should decrease over time if model is learning

clickhouse_sql.name: Learner Loss
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as loss FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.loss' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🎁 Rewards (Mean/Min/Max by Actor)
panels.description: Reward statistics per actor - should increase over time

clickhouse_sql.name: Mean Reward (Actor {{actor_id}})
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as reward, attributes['actor_id'] as actor_id FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.reward.mean' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Max Reward
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as reward FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.reward.max' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Min Reward
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as reward FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.reward.min' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: ✅ SMILES Validity Ratio
panels.description: Percentage of valid molecules generated (should stay high ~0.95+)

clickhouse_sql.name: Validity Ratio (Actor {{actor_id}})
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value * 100 as validity_percent, attributes['actor_id'] as actor_id FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.smiles.valid.ratio' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: ⚖️ Importance Weights (Aggregate)
panels.description: V-trace importance weights - Mean should be ~1.0, check Min for problematic actors

clickhouse_sql.name: Mean Weight
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as weight FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.importance_weights.mean' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Min Weight (⚠️ Watch this)
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as weight FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.importance_weights.min' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Max Weight
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as weight FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.importance_weights.max' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: ⚖️ Importance Weights Per Actor (Detect Lagging Actors)
panels.description: Individual importance weights by actor - if one actor consistently low, its policy is too outdated

clickhouse_sql.name: Actor {{actor_id}} Weight
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as weight, attributes['actor_id'] as actor_id FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.importance_weight' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: 🔄 Model Version Lag
panels.description: How many versions behind each actor is from latest model (should stay low <5)

clickhouse_sql.name: Version Lag (Actor {{actor_id}})
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as lag, attributes['actor_id'] as actor_id FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='model.version.lag' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

panels.title: 📦 NATS Queue Depth
panels.description: Number of trajectories waiting to be processed (high = actors too fast, learner bottleneck)

clickhouse_sql.name: Queue Depth
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as depth FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='nats.queue.depth' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Learner Update
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as duration FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='learner.update.duration' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Actor Trajectory Gen
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as duration FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.trajectory_generation.duration' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Actor Sampling
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as duration FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.sampling.duration' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time

clickhouse_sql.name: Actor Scoring
clickhouse_sql.query: SELECT toDateTime(unix_milli/1000) as time, value as duration FROM distributed_samples_v4 WHERE metric_name='actor.scoring.duration' AND time >= now() - INTERVAL 1 HOUR ORDER BY time
